extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe won after VINGEGAARD Jonas personally led him out in final kilometer, catching late attacker HEGGENES Andreas mere meters from the line.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD Jonas sacrificed GC positioning by leading out LAPORTE in final kilometer, unprecedented work by Tour champion.
Breakaway caught within 200 meters shows five category-four climbs plus 9000ft cumulative gain neutralizes escape chances.
HEGGENES Andreas nearly held off field despite looking back repeatedly in final kilometer, showing pure sprinters vulnerable here.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Took personal responsibility for leadout work in final kilometer, revealing team prioritizes stage wins early over GC positioning
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: Only true sprinter to survive 9000ft climbing in rain and still finish leadout, exceptional versatility
rider_signals.HEGGENES Andreas: positive: Held off charging peloton until final 200 meters from long breakaway, nearly stole stage despite tactical errors
rider_signals.HEITER Ethan: negative: Crashed twice during stage, early-race vulnerability signal
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: Second place finish shows climbing sprinter capability, competitive against specialist LAPORTE
